use_cases: Display status labels on dashboard cards
Show category tags on content items
Indicate feature flags or plan tiers
Mark items with destructive or secondary states
Add visual hierarchy with outline badges
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with multiple variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) using class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Features hover and focus states for accessibility, rounded pill design, and border variants. Commonly used in dashboards, e-commerce platforms, and SaaS applications to display status indicators, tags, labels, and categorical information.
